title: Service Desk alert received
message: INC-2026-00428 reports User account locked repeatedly on AD-USER-PRIYA.R.

payload.current_state: User account locked 7 times in 20 minutes from workstation LAP-2217.
payload.requested_outcome: Identify lockout source, unlock account after approval, and validate login.

title: SOP retrieved
message: Identify source device, avoid password reset first, unlock after approval, and validate login.

payload.title: Repeated User Account Lockout
controls: Do not reset password unless requested by identity policy.
Validate successful login and stop repeated lockouts.

title: Historical tickets compared
message: 5 similar tickets found; 1 unsafe precedent flagged.
